critical_issues.title: All inventory items showing expired status with negative days to expiry
critical_issues.root_cause: System date configuration error or incorrect expiry date calculation resulting in all items showing -198 to -371 days past expiry
critical_issues.impact: ₹68,165 total inventory at risk if items are actually expired
critical_issues.recommendation: Immediately verify actual physical expiry dates of all perishable items, correct system date settings, recalibrate inventory management system expiry tracking, and implement daily expiry monitoring

critical_issues.title: Severe understocking across all categories - 80% below maximum capacity
critical_issues.root_cause: Poor inventory planning with current stock averaging only 20% of max stock levels (e.g., Ciabatta at 25%, Chicken at 22.5%, most proteins below 30%)
critical_issues.impact: Potential stockouts leading to menu item unavailability and lost revenue opportunities
critical_issues.recommendation: Establish automated reorder triggers when stock hits 40% of max capacity, negotiate with suppliers for more frequent smaller deliveries, implement daily stock level reviews for high-velocity items

critical_issues.title: Critical stock levels on specialty ingredients
critical_issues.root_cause: High-value specialty items like Bhut Jolokia Oil (2 units), Arugula (5 units), and Cheesecake Base Mix (5 units) at dangerously low levels, risking menu item unavailability
critical_issues.impact: Loss of signature menu items and customer dissatisfaction
critical_issues.recommendation: Maintain minimum 2-week buffer stock for specialty items, implement daily tracking for items with stock below 10 units, establish backup supplier relationships for critical ingredients

critical_issues.title: High-value protein inventory at minimum levels
critical_issues.root_cause: Premium proteins (Lamb Shoulder at 8 units/₹5,200, Pork Belly at 9 units/₹4,050, Goan Chorizo at 7 units/₹3,850) hovering near reorder levels indicating reactive rather than proactive ordering
critical_issues.impact: ₹13,100 in high-margin protein items at risk of stockout
critical_issues.recommendation: Increase reorder levels for proteins to 150% of current levels, implement 3-day advance ordering based on historical demand patterns, monitor daily sales velocity for protein-based menu items

critical_issues.title: No operational data available for performance analysis
critical_issues.root_cause: Missing order data, kitchen time metrics, and table turnover information preventing operational efficiency assessment
critical_issues.impact: Unable to identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, or optimize kitchen operations
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement POS system integration to track order completion times, kitchen preparation times, table turnover rates, and peak hour patterns; establish daily reporting dashboard

critical_issues.title: No financial transaction data for revenue analysis
critical_issues.root_cause: Missing sales data, order information, and revenue metrics preventing financial performance evaluation
critical_issues.impact: Cannot assess profitability, identify revenue trends, or calculate cost of goods sold
critical_issues.recommendation: Integrate POS and accounting systems to track daily revenue, order values, payment methods, and discount usage; implement real-time financial dashboard for management review

critical_issues.title: Inadequate inventory turnover planning
critical_issues.root_cause: Stock levels show no correlation with shelf life urgency - items with 3-5 day shelf life (Ciabatta, Chicken, Burrata) stocked at same proportion as longer shelf life items
critical_issues.impact: Potential waste from perishable items expiring before use
critical_issues.recommendation: Implement just-in-time ordering for items with shelf life under 7 days, order perishables based on 2-day demand forecast rather than max stock levels, establish par levels based on actual daily usage
